title: Beef Hunger Bar
description: Changes the default hunger bar to a nice beef one, also has mod support
body:
This texturepack replaces chicken leg hunger bar with beef!
All in this pack is in vanilla resolution.
Replaces hunger and saturation effect.
It supports both 1.20.4 and 1.20.1 format, so its compatible with more versions at the same time
It also has a MOD SUPPORT! AppleSkin by squeek502 and Farmer's Delight by vectorwing.
For AppleSkin, it changes the shape of the saturation outline to beef.
For Farmer's Delight, it changes the nourishment effect and the golden hunger bar that comes with it.

If you want to use any assets from the pack, ask for a permission first (best on PMC)

Enjoy :D
